questions: What is multivariate testing (MVT) and when to use it?
How does MVT compare to A/B/n tests?
qa.answer: MVT tests multiple elements and their interactions simultaneously. It requires large traffic and careful design; use A/B/n when traffic is limited or when isolating a single element is preferred.
implication: Estimate required samples with power; avoid underpowered MVT.
Prioritize high‑impact areas (hero, headline, CTA, form) for MVT.
Analyze interactions; promote winning combinations, not isolated parts.
